name: The Plague
description: A deadly disease sweeps through the land.
flavor_text: Coughing echoes through the streets as darkness falls...

location_flavor.forest: Mosquitoes from the marshes carry the disease deeper into the woods...
location_flavor.coast: Sailors bring the illness from distant ports...
location_flavor.mountain: The thin mountain air offers some protection, but the sickness persists...
location_flavor.desert: The dry heat slows the spread, but those who fall ill suffer greatly...
location_flavor.plains: Open settlements with no barriers let the plague spread unchecked...

name: The Great Drought
description: Water sources dry up. Crops wither in the fields.
flavor_text: The sun beats down mercilessly. Not a cloud in sight for weeks...

location_flavor.desert: The already parched land cracks and crumbles to dust...
location_flavor.plains: Golden wheat fields wither to brown husks overnight...
location_flavor.coast: The sea breeze offers little relief as wells run dry...
location_flavor.mountain: Mountain streams slow to a trickle, then stop entirely...
location_flavor.forest: Ancient trees shed their leaves in midsummer desperation...

name: Earthquake
description: The ground shakes violently, cracking foundations.
flavor_text: A deep rumble rises from below. The earth splits open...

location_flavor.mountain: The mountainside fractures, sending boulders cascading down...
location_flavor.desert: Sand liquefies beneath your feet as fissures tear the ground...
location_flavor.plains: The flat earth buckles and heaves like a rolling sea...
location_flavor.coast: The harbor splits apart as the seabed shifts violently...
location_flavor.forest: Ancient trees topple as their roots lose grip on splitting earth...

name: Raider Attack
description: Armed bandits descend upon your colony.
flavor_text: Torches flicker on the horizon. War drums echo in the night...

location_flavor.plains: Raiders charge across the open grasslands with nowhere to hide...
location_flavor.desert: Bandits emerge from sand dunes, striking swiftly then vanishing...
location_flavor.forest: Outlaws ambush from the treeline, using the dense woods as cover...
location_flavor.coast: Pirates row ashore under cover of fog, looting the docks...
location_flavor.mountain: Mountain passes make defense easier, but the raiders know shortcuts...

name: Famine
description: Crops fail across the region. Hunger spreads.
flavor_text: Empty fields stretch endlessly. The granaries echo hollow...

location_flavor.desert: Nothing grows. The sand swallows every seed planted...
location_flavor.mountain: Rocky soil yields nothing. Even mountain herbs wither and die...
location_flavor.coast: Salt spray poisons the soil. Fishing nets come back empty...
location_flavor.plains: The breadbasket of the region lies barren and silent...
location_flavor.forest: Forest foraging fails. Even mushrooms refuse to grow...

name: Blizzard
description: A brutal winter storm engulfs the colony.
flavor_text: Ice crystals form on every surface. The wind howls like a beast...

location_flavor.mountain: The blizzard at altitude is lethal. Snow buries entire buildings...
location_flavor.plains: White-out conditions. No shelter for miles in any direction...
location_flavor.forest: Trees snap under the weight of ice. The canopy provides no warmth...
location_flavor.coast: Freezing sea spray coats everything in a shell of ice...
location_flavor.desert: An impossible cold front. The desert has never seen snow before...

name: The Great Flood
description: Rivers overflow, submerging structures and fields.
flavor_text: Water rises silently in the night. By dawn, half the colony is submerged...

location_flavor.coast: Storm surge breaches the seawall. The ocean claims the lower town...
location_flavor.plains: Rivers burst their banks, turning fields into an inland sea...
location_flavor.forest: Mudslides choke the streams. Brown water surges through the camp...
location_flavor.mountain: Meltwater cascades down, but the steep terrain channels it away quickly...
location_flavor.desert: A flash flood roars through the dry wadi without warning...

name: Locust Swarm
description: A massive swarm descends, devouring everything green.
flavor_text: The sky darkens. A deafening buzz fills the air...

location_flavor.plains: The swarm descends on endless croplands with devastating appetite...
location_flavor.forest: Locusts strip leaves from every tree in a matter of hours...
location_flavor.coast: The swarm arrives on the sea wind, devouring gardens and orchards...
location_flavor.desert: Even the hardy desert scrub is consumed by the ravenous cloud...
location_flavor.mountain: Highland winds scatter the swarm before it can do its worst...

name: Meteor Strike
description: A flaming rock from the sky crashes into the colony.
flavor_text: A streak of fire tears across the heavens. Impact in 3... 2... 1...

location_flavor.plains: The fireball strikes the open plain, leaving a smoking crater...
location_flavor.mountain: Rock shatters on impact, sending deadly shrapnel down the slopes...
location_flavor.forest: The impact ignites the canopy. Fire and debris rain down...
location_flavor.coast: The meteor hits offshore, sending a wall of steam and water inland...
location_flavor.desert: Sand turns to glass around the impact site. The shockwave flattens tents...

name: Wildfire
description: Flames rage through the colony, consuming everything.
flavor_text: Smoke chokes the sky. Orange flames dance from roof to roof...

location_flavor.forest: Dry timber ignites like kindling. The entire forest becomes an inferno...
location_flavor.plains: Grass fires race across the flatlands faster than anyone can run...
location_flavor.desert: Tinder-dry structures catch fire from a single spark...
location_flavor.coast: The sea breeze fans the flames, spreading fire across the docks...
location_flavor.mountain: Rocky terrain contains the fire, but smoke fills the valley...

name: Rebellion
description: Discontent boils over. Citizens revolt against leadership.
flavor_text: Angry voices rise. Torches and pitchforks fill the square...

location_flavor.coast: Dockworkers blockade the harbor, demanding better conditions...
location_flavor.mountain: Miners down tools and barricade the mountain passes...
location_flavor.plains: Farmers march on the colony center, burning fields in protest...
location_flavor.forest: Woodcutters vanish into the forest, forming a rebel camp...
location_flavor.desert: Water rationing sparks fury. Citizens storm the wells...

name: Sandstorm
description: A wall of sand buries crops and clogs machinery.
flavor_text: The horizon vanishes behind a brown wall. Grit fills every crevice...

location_flavor.desert: A wall of sand buries the colony in minutes. Breathing becomes impossible...
location_flavor.plains: Dust clouds blot out the sun across the open flatlands...
location_flavor.coast: Sand blasts the harbor, scouring paint from every surface...
location_flavor.mountain: Wind-driven grit batters the exposed mountain settlement...
location_flavor.forest: The canopy filters most sand, but machinery still clogs...

name: Tsunami
description: A massive wave crashes inland, destroying everything in its path.
flavor_text: The ocean pulls back... then returns with terrifying force...

location_flavor.coast: The tsunami smashes through the harbor, dragging ships inland...
location_flavor.plains: The wave travels far inland across the flat terrain...
location_flavor.forest: Trees absorb some force, but debris creates deadly projectiles...
location_flavor.mountain: High ground saves the colony center, but lower buildings are lost...
location_flavor.desert: The distant coast seems safe, but the wave reaches further than expected...

name: Volcanic Eruption
description: Molten lava flows from the mountains, incinerating all in its path.
flavor_text: The mountain splits. Red rivers of fire flow toward the colony...

location_flavor.mountain: Lava flows directly through the settlement. Nowhere to run...
location_flavor.forest: Burning ash ignites the canopy. Lava flows between the trees...
location_flavor.plains: The distant eruption sends ash clouds that darken the sky for days...
location_flavor.coast: Lava meets the sea, creating deadly clouds of toxic steam...
location_flavor.desert: Volcanic ash mixes with sand, creating an abrasive, choking storm...

name: Creeping Sickness
description: A slow-spreading illness weakens the colony over time.
flavor_text: First one falls ill. Then another. And another...

location_flavor.coast: Contaminated fish spreads the sickness through the markets...
location_flavor.plains: Shared wells become breeding grounds for the illness...
location_flavor.forest: Damp conditions breed disease. Mold and rot everywhere...
location_flavor.mountain: Isolation helps, but the thin air weakens immune systems...
location_flavor.desert: Dehydration makes the sick even more vulnerable...

name: Bandit Siege
description: Organized criminals blockade trade routes and extort the colony.
flavor_text: Roads are blocked. Merchants refuse to travel. The colony is isolated...

location_flavor.forest: Bandits use the dense woodland to set ambushes on every path...
location_flavor.plains: With no cover, the bandits boldly blockade all trade routes...
location_flavor.coast: Pirates and bandits work together, cutting off land and sea...
location_flavor.mountain: A single blocked pass cuts the colony off entirely...
location_flavor.desert: Sandstorms provide cover for the bandits' raids on caravans...

name: Solar Flare
description: Intense radiation from the sun disrupts research and knowledge.
flavor_text: The sky burns with an unnatural light. Instruments fail one by one...

location_flavor.desert: The already harsh sun becomes unbearable. Equipment melts...
location_flavor.plains: Exposed instruments fry instantly under the solar bombardment...
location_flavor.coast: The aurora over the sea would be beautiful, if not for the destruction...
location_flavor.mountain: At altitude, the radiation is even more intense...
location_flavor.forest: The canopy provides some shelter, but delicate instruments still fail...

name: Avalanche
description: A wall of snow and rock cascades down the mountainside.
flavor_text: A crack echoes. Then silence. Then the roar of a thousand tons of snow...

location_flavor.mountain: The avalanche buries the settlement under meters of ice and rock...
location_flavor.forest: Snow cascades through the trees, snapping trunks like twigs...
location_flavor.plains: Distant mountains send a wave of snow across the flat terrain...
location_flavor.coast: Coastal cliffs collapse, sending ice and rock into the harbor...
location_flavor.desert: A rare rockslide mimics an avalanche in the barren hills...

name: Tornado
description: A violent twister tears through the colony.
flavor_text: The sky turns green. A funnel descends with devastating force...

location_flavor.plains: The tornado has free reign across the open flatlands...
location_flavor.coast: A waterspout makes landfall, tearing through the harbor...
location_flavor.desert: A sand devil grows into a monster, ripping through the camp...
location_flavor.forest: The twister shreds through the canopy, hurling logs like missiles...
location_flavor.mountain: Funneling through the valley, the tornado gains terrible speed...

name: Scorching Heatwave
description: Temperatures soar to deadly levels for days on end.
flavor_text: The air shimmers. Metal burns to touch. Water evaporates before noon...

location_flavor.desert: The desert becomes a furnace. Even the sand radiates lethal heat...
location_flavor.plains: No shade anywhere. The heatwave bakes the open grasslands...
location_flavor.coast: Humid heat makes the air feel like breathing soup...
location_flavor.mountain: Even the highlands offer no escape from this unnatural warmth...
location_flavor.forest: The forest canopy traps the heat, creating a suffocating greenhouse...
